---
title: "Jane Harris"
---

## Jane Harris

**Dates:** (1796-1879)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

sister of Rev. John Yonge of Puslinch and Lady Seaton

### Biography

She married (1837, in Canada, where she had gone with the Seatons) the Rev. Joseph Hemington Harris (1799/1800-1881) D. D., incumbent of Torre, near Torquay, a widower with one son, the Rev. George Collyer Harris.

### Letters

- Letter from March 20th 1876
- Letter from Febry 12th 1876
- Letter from May 7, 1874.
- Letter from Sept 19th  [1846[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
